entries.source: "Create geography flashcards"
entries.value: "भूगोलका फ्ल्यासकार्डहरू सिर्जना गर्नुहोस्"

entries.source: "Make flashcards for mitosis"
entries.value: "माइटोसिसका लागि फ्ल्यासकार्डहरू बनाउनुहोस्"

entries.source: "Turn this note into Q&A"
entries.value: "यो नोटलाई प्रश्न-उत्तरमा बदल्नुहोस्"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Flashcard Builder on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Practice learning का लागि inspir मा Flashcard Builder प्रयोग गर्ने व्यावहारिक guide, prompt, study loop र सुरक्षित AI बानी सहित।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अझ बलियो study loop

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn notes or topics into clear flashcards with answers, traps, and review prompts.
entries.value: Active Recall का लागि AI Flashcard Builder निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: notes वा topics लाई answer, traps र review prompts सहितका स्पष्ट flashcards मा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall: practical guide
entries.value: Active Recall का लागि AI Flashcard Builder: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer भन्दा सानो first step माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI लाई result मात्र होइन, तपाईंको reasoning check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: कार्डहरूले एक पटकमा एउटा मात्र कुरा सोध्छन् र झुक्याउने प्रश्नहरू समावेश गर्छन्, जसले गर्दा पुनरावलोकनले केवल पहिचान मात्र होइन, बुझाइ पनि बढाउँछ।

entries.source: Create recall cards.
entries.value: recall cards बनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory बाट idea फिर्ता लेखेर finish गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Flashcard Builder
entries.value: फ्ल्यासकार्ड बिल्डर

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: अभ्यास

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: try गर्ने prompts

entries.source: Reveal answers when ready.
entries.value: ready हुँदा answers reveal गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Review misses sooner.
entries.value: misses चाँडै review गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Start the live mode at Flashcard Builder. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Memory Palace. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Flashcard Builder मा live mode सुरु गर्नुहोस्। neighbouring learning format चाहनुहुन्छ भने Memory Palace try गर्नुहोस्। platform को broader view का लागि AI learning companion ले सबैका लागि के गर्नुपर्छ पढ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Students preparing for exams, language learners, and anyone using retrieval practice.
entries.value: परीक्षाको तयारी गरिरहेका विद्यार्थीहरू, भाषा सिक्नेहरू, र रिट्राइभल प्रक्टिस (स्मरण अभ्यास) प्रयोग गर्ने जो कोही।

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: mode लाई तपाईं के सिक्न वा produce गर्न खोज्दै हुनुहुन्छ भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: त्यो difference flow मा देखिन्छ। एउटा giant response को सट्टा best sessions loop हुँदै अघि बढ्छन्: goal set गर्नुहोस्, केही try गर्नुहोस्, feedback पाउनुहोस्, weak spot repair गर्नुहोस्, र next action choose गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: त्यो focus महत्त्वपूर्ण छ। general chatbot ले लगभग सबै कुरा answer गर्न सक्छ, तर learning mode ले conversation लाई shape दिन्छ। यसले idea stick हुन मद्दत गर्ने thinking, practice, feedback, वा exploration तर्फ तपाईंलाई nudge गर्छ।

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: यो cheating नगरी AI सँग study गर्ने same habit हो: learner active राख्नुहोस्। AI तपाईंको thinking मा feedback दिँदा सबैभन्दा useful हुन्छ।

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: यो mode विशेष रूपमा यस्ता learners का लागि useful छ जो चाहन्छन्:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: चरणलाई आफ्नै शब्दमा प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: छिटो सुरु हुने तर तपाईंअनुसार adapt हुने session चाहनुहुन्छ भने Flashcard Builder प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। पहिलो goal प्रभावशाली सुनिनु होइन। पहिलो goal अर्को step सम्भव महसुस गराउनु हो।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: यो mode ले केमा मद्दत गर्छ

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: अब कहाँ जाने

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तपाईं आफ्नो वास्तविक समस्याको rough version बाट पनि सुरु गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। messy first prompt ठीकै छ। सुरु गरेपछि session ले level, audience, deadline, र style clarify गर्न सक्छ।
